arguments: $path = $args[0]; $dir = if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($path)) { (Get-Location).Path } else { Split-Path -Parent $path }; while ($dir -and -not (Test-Path -LiteralPath (Join-Path $dir 'scripts/format-stdin.ps1'))) { $parent = Split-Path -Parent $dir; if ($parent -eq $dir) { $dir = $null; break }; $dir = $parent }; if (-not $dir) { throw 'Unable to locate scripts/format-stdin.ps1 from buffer path.' }; & (Join-Path $dir 'scripts/format-stdin.ps1') -Path $path
